creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* Rusty Nejdl (rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com) wrote:

> Looking at the gnash website, they claim 0.8.9 is still beta:
> 
> http://www.gnu.org/software/gnash/download.html

If I'm not mistaken, 'beta' is status for whole project, not current
version. So any version is 'beta'.

> I hadn't received any feedback on this and also, I have never had a 
> very good working gnash on my system.

It never 'worked very good', and I doubt it ever will.

> So, please let me know what I can do to move this along.  I don't have 
> a lot of time to keep pushing PR's that get stuck like this.

Please give me couple more days and I'll commit the update.

--
